title: Blood-pressure panel Observation.component[] -> two measurement rows (panel parent filtered)
notes:
Real basis: fhir.observation id 28bbec1d-0cb4-830e-b8f5-23c8ff5c17fa (US Core blood-pressure panel). The outer Observation carries LOINC 85354-9 ('Blood pressure panel with all children optional') but NO own value[x] -- only its two components do. The component fan-out edge (Observation_component__measurement) emits ONE measurement row per component; the top-level Observation edge emits NOTHING for the parent.

Panel-parent filtering: 85354-9 resolves to standard concept 36203185 (Measurement domain, standard='S'), so it is a recognized code. But staging.observation_coded carries the parent's own value slots, which are all empty here, and _resolve_observation.sql drops the parent via its value-presence WHERE ((value_number|value_string|value_code|value_text) IS NOT NULL). Verified live: zero rows in cdm_ours_fhir.measurement and zero in cdm_ours_fhir.observation for observation_source_value='85354-9' on this resource. The parent's clinical content lives entirely in the components.

Component rows (from _resolve_observation_component.sql + Observation_component__measurement.sql, both filter to std_domain='Measurement' and require component_value_num IS NOT NULL):
  * Systolic component, code.coding LOINC 8480-6 -> source concept 3004249 ('Systolic blood pressure', Measurement, standard='S'). Since the LOINC source concept is itself standard it self-maps via 'Maps to', so measurement_concept_id = measurement_source_concept_id = 3004249. valueQuantity.value 112 -> value_as_number; UCUM 'mm[Hg]' -> unit_concept_id 8876 ('millimeter mercury column', UCUM, standard='S'); valueQuantity.unit 'mm[Hg]' -> unit_source_value.
  * Diastolic component, code.coding LOINC 8462-4 -> source concept 3012888 ('Diastolic blood pressure', Measurement, standard='S'); self-maps so measurement_concept_id = measurement_source_concept_id = 3012888. valueQuantity.value 79 -> value_as_number; same unit_concept_id 8876.

Shared across both rows: measurement_type_concept_id = 32817 (constant in stage-2 SQL). measurement_source_value is the verbatim component LOINC code (8480-6 / 8462-4). measurement_date / measurement_datetime derive from the PARENT Observation.effectiveDateTime 2025-06-25T11:58:43+01:00 (the view reads effective off the outer resource, components inherit it) -> date 2025-06-25, datetime 2025-06-25 11:58:43. person_id from subject (Patient/patient-1); visit_occurrence_id from encounter (Encounter/enc-1). provider_id is NULL because the source Observation has no performer (performer.first() is empty). All other measurement columns are NULL: measurement_time, operator_concept_id, value_as_concept_id, range_low/high, visit_detail_id, unit_source_concept_id, value_source_value, measurement_event_id, meas_event_field_concept_id.

Code systems: code.coding.system 'http://loinc.org' -> LOINC and valueQuantity.system 'http://unitsofmeasure.org' -> UCUM via cm.fhir_system_to_omop_vocab. status 'final' passes the entered-in-error/cancelled/unknown filter. Observation.category (vital-signs) and meta.profile are not read by this edge and are stripped.

code.text: Blood pressure panel with all children optional

coding.display: Blood pressure panel with all children optional
